title: Mor în continuare români de Covid. Statul a sistat importul de vaccinuri și ne recomandă să ne spălăm pe mâini
summary: Romania has completely stopped importing COVID-19 vaccines, becoming the only EU country where vaccination against COVID-19 is unavailable to the population. Despite ongoing infections and deaths, the anti-vaccine movement fueled by sovereignist politicians has also caused measles vaccination rates to drop to 47.4%, leading to a declared national epidemic with 30 deaths between 2023-2025.
talking_points: Romania is the only EU member state where COVID-19 vaccination is completely unavailable to the public, with the government ceasing vaccine imports
The anti-vaccine movement, amplified by sovereignist politicians like George Simion and Diana Șoșoacă, has caused general vaccination rates to plummet, including measles coverage falling to 47.4%
Over 40,000 Romanians tested positive for COVID-19 in 2025 alone, yet vaccines, updated annually in other countries, cannot be obtained anywhere in Romania
Citizens with chronic conditions or repeated COVID infections are forced to consider traveling abroad for vaccination at their own expense
The pandemic exposed deep institutional failures: over 67,000 COVID deaths, GDP contraction of 3.7%, and widened educational and social inequalities
author: Vlad Ilina
